name: search_customer
description: Find a customer account by name, email, phone, username, or order id.

name: lookup_subscription
description: Read the status, plan, renewal date, or details of an existing subscription.

name: cancel_subscription
description: Cancel a subscription. Handles billing and payment concerns and stops the plan.

name: pause_subscription
description: Temporarily pause a subscription and its billing for a period of time.

name: disable_auto_renew
description: Stop a subscription from automatically renewing and rebilling in future cycles.

name: change_subscription_plan
description: Move a subscription to a different plan or tier (for example basic, pro, premium).

target_plan.description: The plan or tier to switch to.

name: issue_refund
description: Resolve billing and money problems: refund charges, reverse payments, and handle requests about being charged, invoices, and getting money back.

name: dispute_charge
description: Open a dispute for an unauthorized, unrecognized, or fraudulent charge.

name: apply_account_credit
description: Add a credit to the customer's account balance for future use.

name: escalate_to_human
description: Escalate legal, high-risk, or unsupported requests to a human agent.
